title: Sliverdew 50 Pcs Artificial Green Leaves Rose Leaves Bulk Fake Leave for DIY Wedding Bouquets Bridal Wreath Decor (Green)
features: Generous Quantity and Versatility: Get 50 pieces of high-quality artificial rose leaves made from durable Polyester and Iron wires, perfect for weddings, parties, and home decor. These lifelike leaves won’t fade, are reusable, and can be used for bouquets, garlands, table centerpieces, cake arrangements, and more. Their natural texture and vibrant color bring elegance to any event or space.

Realistic Design and Durability: Crafted from Polyester and Iron wires, each leaf mimics the delicate texture of real leaves with lifelike fullness and natural colors. No need to worry about watering, pruning, or wilting—these leaves stay vibrant. Easy to clean with just water, they’re reusable and perfect for long-term storage.

Flexible and Creative Decor: Wire stems allow you to bend and shape these artificial leaves to fit any design, whether for bridal bouquets, wreaths, or wall backgrounds. Use them alone or mix with other flowers for a touch of nature. Ideal for weddings, baby showers, Christmas, or DIY projects.

Low-Maintenance Elegance: These artificial green leaves require no watering or pruning and stay fresh year-round. Perfect for busy wedding planners or home decorators who want long-lasting beauty without hassle. Simply wash and dry for storage after use.

Wide Range of Applications: From weddings and parties to home decor, these leaves enhance any celebration or space. Use them for bridal bouquets, cake arrangements, centerpieces, garlands, or as standalone accents. Their versatility and natural look make them a go-to choice for every occasion.
description: Specifications: Name: Artificial rose leaves Color: Green Material: Polyester + Iron wire Size: Length 5CM, Width 3CM Gross weight: 12g Packing list: 50pcs dark green artificial leaves
